Description: Cmd+N (new note), Cmd+Shift+N (new folder), Cmd+1/2/3 (headings), Cmd+Delete (trash), Cmd+Shift+L (toggle list), Cmd+L (insert link), arrow-key sidebar navigation
Floating undo toast (5s) after destructive ops: delete, move, archive, pin/unpin. Single undo step with revert action.
CSSearchableIndex for note titles and content. Notes appear in macOS Spotlight with deep links back to Jot.
Native NSPrintOperation for current note. Respects formatting, images, and layout.
macOS share sheet target. Capture URLs, text, and images from any app into a new Jot note. New extension target.
App Intents framework: create note, open note, search notes, append to note. Surfaces in Shortcuts app and Siri.
Periodic automatic backup of SwiftData store to user-configured folder. Configurable frequency. Restore from backup UI.
Periodic snapshots on significant edits. Timeline viewer to browse and restore previous versions.
Desktop/Notification Center widgets: pinned notes, recent notes. New WidgetKit extension target.
Optional date+time per note with macOS notification. Lightweight reminder, not a task manager.
System-wide hotkey summons floating capture window from any app. Type, dismiss, saved.
Auto-populating folders based on rules: tags, modification date, unchecked todos. Rule editor UI.
Pre-structured note templates plus Save as Template. Template picker on new note creation.
Reverse @mentions panel showing which notes reference the current note.
Distraction-free writing: hide sidebar/toolbar, expand editor. Optional typewriter mode.
Global shortcut to create note from clipboard content instantly.
